creator: boris@tagnet.ru
text:
Compilation of KDEPIM 3.5.5 failed with folliwing error message

*** Warning: Linking the shared library conduit_mal.la against the loadable module
*** libmal.so is not portable!
grep: /usr/local/lib/libpisock.la: No such file or directory
sed: /usr/local/lib/libpisock.la: No such file or directory
libtool: link: `/usr/local/lib/libpisock.la' is not a valid libtool archive
gmake[4]: *** [conduit_mal.la] ïÛÉÂËÁ 1
gmake[4]: Leaving directory `/mnt/work.0/usr/ports/deskutils/kdepim3/work/kdepim-3.5.5/kpilot/conduits/malconduit'
gmake[3]: *** [all-recursive] ïÛÉÂËÁ 1
gmake[3]: Leaving directory `/mnt/work.0/usr/ports/deskutils/kdepim3/work/kdepim-3.5.5/kpilot/conduits'

gmake: *** [all] ïÛÉÂËÁ 2
*** Error code 2

    /usr/local/lib/libpisock.la realy isn't present on my system. Reinstalling
    pilot-link did not help. The ports tree and istalled ports are up to date
